news.t: IndexIQ Launches IQ MacKay Securitized Income ETF (SECR)

overview.description: The NYLI MacKay Securitized Income ETF (SECR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed, broad portfolio of securitized US fixed income securities. It seeks total return and current income. SECR was launched on May 31, 2024 and is issued by New York Life Investments.

data.title: IndexIQ Launches IQ MacKay Securitized Income ETF (SECR)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IndexIQ launches SECR; new fund provides actively managed solution for accessing opportunities across the structured products landscape.
